name: Whitelist Bypass
subtitle: Experimental iOS builds for whitelist-bypass
description: Unsigned proxy-only iOS builds for AltStore/SideStore. Install Happ, Telegram, Streisand or any VPN app that supports SOCKS/Xray links. Start this app, open Add / Copy Profile, then add to Happ/Telegram or copy the generated proxy profile and import it into your VPN app. The proxy-only build does not include PacketTunnel, so it does not require NetworkExtension signing.

apps.name: Whitelist Bypass Proxy
apps.subtitle: SOCKS proxy over call transport
apps.localizedDescription: Experimental iOS proxy-only build for whitelist-bypass. Supports WB room URL normalization, for example https://stream.wb.ru/room/<room> is converted to wbstream://<room>. Install Happ, Telegram, Streisand or any VPN app that supports SOCKS/Xray links. Start this app, open Add / Copy Profile, then add to Happ/Telegram or copy the generated proxy profile and import it into your VPN app. This AltStore build is proxy-only and does not include the PacketTunnel VPN extension.

versions.localizedDescription: Proxy-only AltStore build. Adds automatic WB stream URL normalization, refreshed UI, a clean Add / Copy Profile menu.

news.title: AltStore source added
news.caption: Proxy-only iOS build with WB room URL normalization, a clean Add / Copy Profile menu.
